operating_state: No operating performance data disclosed in these filings, which contain only leadership transition and executive compensation information.
cost_structure: No cost structure information disclosed in these filings.
material_events: Devinder Kumar retired as CFO effective January 23, 2023, with Jean Hu appointed as his replacement from Marvell Technology. Hu received $725,000 base salary, $5 million sign-on equity award, $12 million make-whole equity compensation, and $2 million cash bonus. Executive bonuses totaling $2.26 million were approved for fiscal 2022 performance, including $918,800 for CEO Lisa Su.
macro_exposures: No new or materially escalated macro risks disclosed in these filings.
forward_outlook: No forward guidance or strategic direction disclosed in these filings.
uncertainty_profile: No material uncertainties or contingencies disclosed in these filings.
